reason: Backend agent, schema catalog, service, and configuration changes must follow backend conventions
Business semantics must integrate with current six-node NL2SQL flow and not reintroduce retired modules
Semantic layer must derive from live schema catalog and respect database_url cache behavior
Invalid semantic overrides and schema refresh failures need controlled diagnostics
Tests are required for schema catalog, graph behavior, and config-sensitive changes
Reuse SchemaCatalog, RagService, LLMService, SQLValidator, and SQLExecutor instead of adding a parallel pipeline
Semantic debug diagnostics may flow through existing API debug fields
